# Ebrostay

> Ebrostay is the bridge between companies and property owners for mid-term corporate rentals (1–12 months) in Zaragoza, Spain. We rebuild property management from first principles to deliver best-in-class service to both sides: furnished, move-in-ready homes for relocating teams and professionals, and full hands-off management for owners. Verified listings, transparent monthly pricing in EUR, booking requests confirmed by email (full stay plus a refundable deposit), availability calendars, and support throughout the stay. Our vision is to become Europe's number one property management company for mid-term corporate rentals — rooted in Zaragoza, built for Europe.

Ebrostay es el puente entre empresas y propietarios para el alquiler corporativo de media estancia (1–12 meses) en Zaragoza, España. Reconstruimos la gestión de propiedades desde primeros principios para ofrecer un servicio de primer nivel a ambos lados: viviendas amuebladas y listas para entrar para equipos y profesionales desplazados, y gestión integral sin esfuerzo para propietarios. Anuncios verificados, precios mensuales transparentes en EUR, solicitudes de reserva que confirmamos por email (estancia completa más fianza reembolsable), calendarios de disponibilidad y soporte durante toda la estancia. Nuestra visión es convertirnos en la empresa de gestión de propiedades número uno de Europa en alquiler corporativo de media estancia: con raíces en Zaragoza, pensada para Europa.

## Properties

- [Movera 7 - 2nd floor](https://ebrostay.com/property.html?id=movera0): second-floor home with 3 private bedrooms at Camino de Movera 7, Zaragoza. From 1350 EUR/month (450 EUR/room).
- [Movera 7 - 1st floor](https://ebrostay.com/property.html?id=movera1): first-floor home with 3 private bedrooms at Camino de Movera 7, Zaragoza. From 1350 EUR/month (450 EUR/room).
- [Pedro II el Católico - 1 planta](https://ebrostay.com/property.html?id=pedro1): apartment at Pedro II el Católico 3, Zaragoza city centre. From 950 EUR/month.
- [Pedro II el Católico - 2 planta](https://ebrostay.com/property.html?id=pedro2): apartment at Pedro II el Católico 3, Zaragoza city centre. From 980 EUR/month.

Listings, prices and availability are kept up to date on the website; each property page shows full conditions (minimum stay, deposit, utilities), photos, an availability calendar, and online booking.

## How booking works

1. Search by dates on [ebrostay.com](https://ebrostay.com/) and open a property.
2. Pick check-in and check-out dates and send a booking request. You see an estimated total (the whole stay, billed in whole months, plus a refundable deposit); nothing is charged online.
3. Ebrostay reviews the request and gets back to you by email to confirm the booking and the next step. Once confirmed, arrival details (wifi, key pickup, emergency contact) are available in the tenant's account.
